purpose: Conservative Platinum-to-Level5 schematic audit candidates. These are not direct Platinum OEM mappings.
global_rules: Do not copy Level5 numeric callout labels onto Platinum labels.
Do not write Level5 part numbers into Platinum sku fields.
Only write a Platinum part name after visual match by component shape, callout target, and assembly location.
Keep Level5 part number under source.derivedFromPartNumber when used as provenance.
Mark size-sensitive flat-box names generic unless Platinum model size is known.

platinum-flat-finishing-box-sch.mapping_action: extract Platinum labels first; then map to generic flat-box component names; defer size-specific Level5 part numbers.

platinum-drywall-pump-w-filler-sch.mapping_action: extract Platinum labels first; then compare label targets against Level5 pump components.

platinum-50-corner-roller-handle-sch.mapping_action: manual visual crosswalk required; no safe label-level mapping yet.

rejected_level5_sources.reason: visual product geometry is inside-corner roller, not Platinum outside 90-degree roller

platinum-outside-90-degree-corner-roller.mapping_action: find an exact Level5 outside-corner roller source or use Platinum/OEM source; do not map from Level5 4-707.
